name: cflare-api
description: Cloudflare Workers LLM gateway with fixed built-in account channels, configurable OpenAI-compatible providers, Vue 3 admin UI, live models, quotas and provider-level proxy routing.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:worker && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.check: node scripts/check-config.mjs && node scripts/check-web.mjs && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web

DB.description: D1 database for providers, encrypted credentials, discovered upstream models, quota snapshots, routes, gateway keys and request logs. It is created automatically during deployment.

CONFIG_CACHE.description: KV namespace for short-lived provider/model configuration cache. It is created automatically during deployment.

USAGE_QUEUE.description: Queue used to write request usage and cost records outside the response path.

MASTER_KEY.description: Required secret. Base64 encoding of exactly 32 random bytes. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Required secret used to sign administrator sessions and authenticate automation. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Administrator login username for /admin. Recommended value: admin

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Administrator login password for /admin. Use a strong unique password.

PROXY_BRIDGE_URL.description: Legacy compatibility setting. Native HTTP/SOCKS proxying no longer requires a bridge.

PROXY_BRIDGE_TOKEN.description: Legacy compatibility setting. Native HTTP/SOCKS proxying no longer requires a bridge token.
